{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113590751694DECE55F94E9814F"}"},"total":1153},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449779507669549849","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有创意，有新意不流俗，不同于其他的穿越爽文，有推理有丝丝入扣的计策和非凡想象力并且将我们读者渐渐吸引不会有突兀的天马行空一切看来是那么的合情合理且又能逐步展现主角的睿智和深沉以及能够掌握局面的情商和为人与事的内敛，使得主角每处于时局变化或对手的算计中往往能巧妙的化险为夷且常立于不败之地。所以常常会惊叹于作者的巧妙的构思出如此鲜活的主人公形象，在这样的主角身上一开始虽非完美无缺且略有技能和对此朝代现状认知的有限，然在剧情推进和主角的学习进步中，不断的提升优化，相信必能展现一个出类拔萃，能有惊天壮举的不世英雄，且殷切期待中，作者给我们读者带来愈来愈精彩的故事"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734543285,"group_id":"7341890195622480921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8VYyPdw4s9wMULnku8Y2ok=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b287227b26a844a6b1344c786a6ff00c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618112&x-signature=X4yeMIeYwPY6MBT5%2BgY3Aiknbco%3D","user_id":"95680044141","user_name":"仙岛的弢喆君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95680044141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1756467856,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341890195622480921","book_info":{"abstract":"陆用，25岁。身份：军警。职务：军委保卫部刑事重案侦缉警，于2023年三月一日因为抓捕特大军事间谍窃密杀人犯进入昆仑山，从此杳无踪迹。
大明王朝，1699年，明武六年。
陆用出现在了太平府（今安徽马鞍山市当涂县）的大青山之中。
陆用这会儿除了一身衣服加个防弹背心，还剩一把九二式满弹手枪，外加两个弹匣，一把军用匕首，还有前女友送给他的一个黄金吊坠，重量是13.14克。
等到陆用从山里出去，才知道自己被时空撕扯了。
当他以为这是个朱元璋建立的大明，时空再次给他开了一个玩笑，原来此大明非彼大明，不过这个大明好像也有那么一点有意思。
从仵作的开始，开启了陆用另一次新的人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/901344687e3ed8f9a6185df75dc790fc","author":"顺手牵虎","author_id":"","book_id":"7341890195622480921","book_name":"一朝穿越，我靠破案名扬天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7359317673571795481","read_count":"15112","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1258384"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"794","tags":"悬疑灵异,穿越,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/208f2d7eb1340ab3aa4b414ed6f18989~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256748&x-signature=AUlij%2BgGgICAhLoX0LyGaIL4mPE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1187119163516750","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"572"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113590751694DECE55F94E9814F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":157637,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":170230,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":17877},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1734544079,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7389997217962984217","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然是穿越，但是这个穿越人物形象丰满，写实，不仅有古代破案，抽丝剥茧，层层递进，还有符合古代社会的人情世故，即学古代社会知识，破案知识，也学人际交往，非常好！","text_exts":[{"e":53,"s":49,"text":"人情世故","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407274894E9814F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227389997217962984217%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227341890195622480921%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720619902,"group_id":"7341890195622480921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw9fgUhG6rAiM9qD7jiGZB8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616560&x-signature=%2FYXVdYO%2FVKzIgYSc4FplMZloIxQ%3D","user_id":"100235260470","user_name":"爱吃酸奶奶昔的季磊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100235260470","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341890195622480921","book_info":{"abstract":"陆用，25岁。身份：军警。职务：军委保卫部刑事重案侦缉警，于2023年三月一日因为抓捕特大军事间谍窃密杀人犯进入昆仑山，从此杳无踪迹。
大明王朝，1699年，明武六年。
陆用出现在了太平府（今安徽马鞍山市当涂县）的大青山之中。
陆用这会儿除了一身衣服加个防弹背心，还剩一把九二式满弹手枪，外加两个弹匣，一把军用匕首，还有前女友送给他的一个黄金吊坠，重量是13.14克。
等到陆用从山里出去，才知道自己被时空撕扯了。
